title: ETH Up or Down - Hourly (Apr 08, 2026 02:00 UTC Close)
rulesText:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the ETH price at the end of the time range specified in this market is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the ETH data stream available (Feed: 0x000362205e10b3a147d02792eccee483dca6c7b44ecce7012cb8c6e0b68b3ae9).

Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream ETH, not according to other sources or spot markets.

title: Bitcoin Up or Down on April 8?(12:00 ET)
rulesText:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the "Close" price for the Binance 1 minute candle for BTC/USDT Apr 7 '26 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) is lower than the final "Close" price for the Apr 8 '26 12:00 ET candle.

This market will resolve to "Down" if the "Close" price for the Binance 1 minute candle for BTC/USDT Apr 7 '26 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) is higher than the final "Close" price for the Apr 8 '26 12:00 ET candle.

If the final "Close" price for both of these candles is exactly equal on Binance, this market will resolve 50-50.

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT "Close" prices currently available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT with "1m" and "Candles" selected on the top bar.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

title: NBA: Thunder vs Clippers (Apr. 8 10:00PM ET)
rulesText:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for April 8 at 10:00PM ET: If the Thunder win, the market will resolve to "Thunder". If the Clippers win, the market will resolve to "Clippers". If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50. The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

Resolution Source：https://www.nba.com/

Note: Opinion will resolve strictly based on the first officially published result from the designated source. Any subsequent revisions will not affect this resolution.

title: LPL 2026 Split 2: TES vs WE (Apr. 8 7:00AM ET)
rulesText:
"This market is based on the League of Legends Pro League (LPL) 2026 Split 2 match between Top Esports (TES) and Team WE (WE), scheduled for April 8 7:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to ""TES"" if Top Esports win the match against Team WE. This market will resolve to ""WE"" if Team WE win the match against Top Esports.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, or if the match does not begin and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.
If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the winning team. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

Note: Opinion will resolve strictly based on the first officially published result from the designated source. Any subsequent revisions will not affect this resolution."

title: KPL Spring 2026: WOL vs KSG (Apr. 11 6:00AM ET)
rulesText:
This market is based on the Honor of Kings match between Wolves (WOL) and KuaiShow Gaming (KSG) in the King Pro League (KPL) Spring 2026 PLayoffs Grand Final, scheduled for April 11 at 6:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "WOL" if Wolves win the match against KuaiShow Gaming.
This market will resolve to "KSG" if KuaiShow Gaming win the match against Wolves.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, or if the match does not begin and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.
If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the winning team. 

This market will resolve based on the final result of the entire match/series, not individual games (e.g. Game 1, Game 2, etc.). The resolution source for this market will be official information from KPL (https://kpl.qq.com/#/Schedule) or liquipedia (https://liquipedia.net/honorofkings/King_Pro_League/2026/Spring/Playoffs).

Note: Opinion will resolve strictly based on the first officially published result from the designated source. Any subsequent revisions will not affect this resolution.
